story: At a hidden cove, Oakley and Harlow meet mermaids Emma and Peyton and swap a pinky promise to keep the meeting secret. Emma murmurs, “Before Papa has the whole fleet looking for us.” That night the older girls dream of a cave and meadow where wings and tails are set aside. Underwater, Emma decides she'll come back after midnight—when patrols thin—and leave a sign: a single red hair knotted to the driftwood post on the outer rock. The next day, Oakley longs to see Emma again.
implausible_knowledge: Underwater, Emma decides she'll come back after midnight—when patrols thin—and leave a sign: a single red hair knotted to the driftwood post on the outer rock.
question: As sunset approaches the next day, how will Oakley try to meet Emma again?
answer_with_knowledge: Go back to the cove after midnight to meet Emma in secret
answer_without_knowledge: Go back to the cove near sunset and wait on the rocks, watching the water for Emma.
